title: Elegant Fashion Style Blueprint Infographic Titled Art
sourceTitle: Elegant Fashion Style Blueprint Infographic Titled Art
prompt: An elegant fashion style blueprint infographic titled "ART & ELEGANCE" by L'Atelier Desmond. The central image features a woman with bouncy, voluminous blonde curls walking in an art gallery, wearing a deep emerald green silk midi dress with an asymmetrical hem, a black oversized textured blazer draped over her shoulders, and nude patent leather slingback heels. She is holding a structured cream leather top-handle handbag and wearing a thick gold choker necklace. The surrounding layout breaks down the outfit, hair, and makeup, showcasing fabric swatches for silk charmeuse and wool blend, close-up details of the accessories, and a neutral-and-green color palette at the bottom.
